Section 3: Experience Timeline

  Professional Journey
  
    
      
      
        Senior Data Engineer
        TeamStation AI
        May 2025 - Present
        Built data lake from scratch with medallion architecture (AWS Glue, Step Functions, Lambda). Implemented CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions for automated deployments. Integrated AI-powered BI tools with natural language querying. Infrastructure as Code with automated testing and deployment workflows.
      
    
    
    
      
      
        Data Engineer
        Previous Company
        2022 - 2025
        Developed ETL pipelines with automated CI/CD workflows. Implemented Docker containerization and orchestration. Built GitHub Actions pipelines for continuous integration and deployment. Optimized database performance and infrastructure automation.
      
    
    
    
      
      
        Junior Developer
        Startup Inc
        2020 - 2022
        Full-stack development with React and Node.js. Built RESTful APIs and responsive web applications.
      
    
    
    
      
      
        BSc Computer Science
        University
        2016 - 2020
        Graduated with honors. Focus on data structures, algorithms, and machine learning.
